aeo_readiness.summary: Cool Running Air has a solid foundation for AEO with a clear service focus and localized content, but improvements in user engagement and content depth are needed.
quick_wins: Add customer reviews and testimonials to build trust and improve engagement.
Expand content to include detailed service descriptions, benefits, and keyword-rich FAQs.
Implement a blog to regularly publish HVAC-related content targeting local search queries.

gbp_analysis.found: The website includes localized terms like 'Hialeah, FL' and service areas, but lacks detailed GBP optimization.
gbp_analysis.summary: The business has basic local signals but needs to enhance its Google Business Profile with more detailed information, photos, and regular updates.
critical_issues: No active Google Business Profile reviews or engagement.
Missing detailed service descriptions and relevant keywords in GBP.
Lack of regular updates or posts on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: The business has inconsistent or incomplete NAP (Name, Address, Phone) citations across directories, which may affect local search visibility.
action_items: Audit and update NAP information across all online directories and platforms.
Ensure consistency in business name, address, and phone number across all citations.
Claim and verify listings on major directories like Yelp, Bing, and Apple Maps.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of rich, engaging content and user-generated content like reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for specific HVAC services or solutions in the local area.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing structured data for services and frequently asked questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating and promoting high-quality, locally-focused content to establish the business as a local HVAC authority.
